title: rubus kmetii
intro: Rubus kmetii, also known as Kmet's raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Eastern Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus kmetii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in jams and preserves due to its sweet and slightly tart flavor.
